dict.string: Home Assistant MQTT Agent Wi-Fi Helper
Home Assistant MQTT Agent uses the current Wi-Fi network name to publish local Mac network telemetry to your Home Assistant MQTT device.
Home Assistant MQTT Agent uses the current Wi-Fi network name to publish local Mac network telemetry to your Home Assistant MQTT device.
Home Assistant MQTT Agent uses the current Wi-Fi network name to publish local Mac network telemetry to your Home Assistant MQTT device.
